game.step1: This is your score display, it can go to negative sometimes, but don't worry about it.
game.step2: This is your game controls, drag dice to select them, and click/touch the selected score you want to save.
game.step3: Score board will show combinations you have scored so far, click to save.
game.step4: To save zero when there is no scoring combination, click/touch the combination name.

toastMessages.registerSuccess: Registration successful! You can now log in.
toastMessages.recoveryEmailSent: A password recovery email has been sent to your address if an account with that email exists.
toastMessages.accountDeleted: Your account has been deleted successfully. We hope to see you again!
toastMessages.saveWarning: Please select a combination to save your game results.
toastMessages.schoolCheck: You have dice that can score a school combination.
toastMessages.schoolFailed: No school combinations could be scored. Game over!

settings.themeHint: Choose how the app looks. System follows your device settings.

multiplayer.noSchoolCombination: No school combination can be scored.

main.intro: You <1>can play unregistered</1>, but you will not be able to save results or checkout other player's stats, consider <3>registering</3>.

profile.accountManagement: Looking for a way to <1>delete your account</1> or <3>clear stats</3>?

help.title: Help
help.intro: Each turn consists of a maximum of three rolls — the first roll to be made with all five dice. If the player elects to roll a second and third time, he may pick up and use any number of dice, providing a score is taken on the last roll. It is the skillful use of these two optional rolls of the dice that can turn an unlucky first or second roll into a high scoring turn. Take a <1></1> to see how the game works in practice.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy for Sharlushka Dice Game
privacy.intro: Thank you for choosing to use Sharlushka Dice Game ('us', 'we', or 'our'). We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. If you have any questions or concerns about our policy or practices with regards to your personal information, please contact us at <1>sharlushka.game@gmail.com</1>. By using the Sharlushka Dice Game, you agree to the terms of this privacy policy. Please take the time to read through the following information.
privacy.linkIntro: Will be used in accourdance with our

infoWeCollect.heading: Information We Collect
infoWeCollect.personalInfoText: To provide you with access to certain features of the game and to enable you to save your results, we may collect the following personal information:
infoWeCollect.autoCollectedText: In addition to the personal information listed above, we may also collect certain information automatically when you use our application. This may include your device's IP address, operating system, browser type, and other technical information.

howWeUse.heading: How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.intro: We use the information we collect for the following purposes:
items: To create and manage user accounts.
To provide and maintain our services.
To improve and personalize user experience.
To communicate with users about their accounts and provide customer support.
To monitor the usage of our services and detect, prevent, and address technical issues.

sharing.heading: Sharing Your Information
sharing.text: We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties except as described in this privacy policy.

security.heading: Security
security.text: We take reasonable measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access or disclosure. However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is completely secure, so we cannot guarantee absolute security.

changes.heading: Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.text: We may update our privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. It is your responsibility to check this page periodically for changes.

contact.heading: Contact Us
contact.text: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at <1>sharlushka.game@gmail.com</1>.

deleteAccount.heading: Delete Account
deleteAccount.intro: To delete your account and associated data from Sharlushka Dice Game, follow these steps:
deleteAccount.intitateDeletion: <0>1. Initiate Deletion:</0> Log in to your account, navigate to the profile page and click the 'Delete Account' link.
deleteAccount.confirmation: <0>2. Confirmation:</0> Confirm your decision to delete the account. Please note that this action is irreversible.

dataRemoval.title: <0>3. Data Removal:</0>
dataRemoval.accountInfo: <0>Account Information:</0> Your account details, including name and email, will be permanently deleted.
dataRemoval.gameResults: <0>Game Results:</0> All associated game results will be removed from our system.
dataRemoval.accessTokens: <0>Access Tokens:</0> Any access tokens related to your account will be invalidated.
dataRemoval.completion: <0>Completion:</0> Once the deletion process is complete, you will receive a confirmation notification.

deleteAccount.contact: For any questions or assistance regarding account deletion, contact us at <1>sharlushka.game@gmail.com</1>.

modal.title: Account Deletion
modal.message: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.

clearStats.heading: Clear Stats
clearStats.info: To delete all your saved game results and clear stats login into your account and navigate to this page. For any questions or assistance regarding deleting the results, contact us at <1>sharlushka.game@gmail.com</1>.
clearStats.warning: Please note that this action is irreversible.

modal.heading: Are you sure?
modal.text: You are about to delete all your game results and clear stats!

tooltips.trainingScores: Your 'training' scores from the first part of the game.
tooltips.favDiceValues: Dice values you choose most often in your games.
tooltips.favCombinations: Dice combinations you saved most often in your games. Tooltips on charts show percentage of games where the combination was saved at least once.
